depth_pass: A2 Depth Pass 2 — Contract Burden Depth

burdens.obligation: Franchise grant for specific territory; term ends June 1 following 10th full Tax Season
$2,500 initial franchise fee, fully earned and non-refundable
Tiered royalty: 60%/40%/20% structure with early-pay discounts
burdens.money: 60%/50% on first $5K; 40%/30% above $5K; 20% incentive on incremental growth

burdens.obligation: Must attend and complete Initial Training to satisfaction; management employees may also be required to attend
Must use H&R Block System, software, and BTR-compliant hardware exclusively; no other tax prep software permitted
burdens.restriction: Prohibited from using non-approved software, hardware, or systems

burdens.obligation: Full-time best efforts during Tax Season and Preseason; comply with Manual; maintain standards
burdens.restriction: Cannot operate internet website or solicit online without authorization

burdens.obligation: Maintain accurate books and records; submit to inspections and audits
burdens.trigger: Ongoing obligation; audit if ≥2% revenue understatement

burdens.obligation: Franchisee and Associates prohibited from competing
burdens.restriction: No owning/working at similar business within 45 miles of territory or any Network Office

burdens.obligation: Post-term noncompete and non-solicitation
burdens.restriction: No similar business within 25 miles of territory for 2 years; no client solicitation
burdens.exceptions: Franchisee termination under §15 with all requirements met

burdens.obligation: Immediate termination for specified incurable defaults
burdens.trigger: Prohibited competition, 3+ defaults in 12 months, conviction, fraud, e-file suspension, bankruptcy, false records, prohibited transfer, cross-default

burdens.obligation: Termination with cure period for other breaches
burdens.trigger: Breach of FLA not listed in §13

burdens.obligation: Franchisee may terminate with notice and payment
burdens.money: 25% of 3-year average gross sales (or 100% of prior year if <3 years)

burdens.obligation: Complete de-identification, return files, assign phone numbers and elected leases, pay all sums
burdens.restriction: If franchisee owns real property, 2-year prohibition on similar-service use
burdens.duration: Immediate upon termination + 2-year real property restriction

burdens.obligation: Franchisor has 30-day right of first refusal to match bona fide offer
All transfers require franchisor approval except certain restructurings
Estate must transfer within 6 months
Franchisee indemnifies H&R Block for claims arising from franchisee's operations
Franchisee is independent contractor, not employee, agent, partner, or joint venturer
Missouri law governs; venue in Jackson County, Missouri state or federal court
Limitations on litigation remedies
Waiver of jury trial (if included)

key_terms.security: All franchise business property (now owned or later acquired)
key_terms.cross_default: Default on FLA or other FPI loans triggers default

key_terms.limit: Up to 20% of prior year net tax prep revenue

general_release.scope: Release required upon renewal or transfer
general_release.state_limitations: CA, IL, MD, MN, ND, WA, WI limit or void release for state franchise law claims
